message:
ci: verify GoReleaser compatibility with Makefile version system

Fixed issues found during CI/CD verification:

1. Updated .goreleaser.yml Homebrew formula test
   - Changed from --version flag to version subcommand
   - packnplay uses subcommand syntax, not flag syntax
   - Previous test would fail on Homebrew formula verification

2. Added fetch-depth: 0 to all CI workflow checkout steps
   - Ensures full git history is available for version derivation
   - Makefile uses 'git describe --tags --always' which needs tags
   - Shallow clones only return commit hash, not tag-based version
   - Now consistent with release workflow configuration

Verification performed:
- Tested GoReleaser snapshot build: ✅ version injection works
- Tested Makefile build: ✅ version injection works
- Verified version command output: ✅ correct format
- Confirmed GoReleaser ldflags match Makefile variables

files.patch:
@@ -13,6 +13,8 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - name: Checkout code
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          fetch-depth: 0
 
       - name: Set up Go
         uses: actions/setup-go@v5
@@ -48,6 +50,8 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - name: Checkout code
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          fetch-depth: 0
 
       - name: Set up Go
         uses: actions/setup-go@v5
@@ -68,6 +72,8 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - name: Checkout code
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          fetch-depth: 0
 
       - name: Set up Docker Buildx
         uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

@@ -90,7 +90,7 @@ brews:
     install: |
       bin.install "packnplay"
     test: |
-      system "#{bin}/packnplay", "--version"
+      system "#{bin}/packnplay", "version"
 
 release:
   github:
